files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.Polling
files.Summary: Provides polling utilities for waiting on asynchronous conditions during tests.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.PollingError
files.Summary: Represents a polling timeout error that aggregates all individual errors collected from each failed polling attempt.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.PollingResult<T>
files.Summary: Represents the result of a polling operation that returns a value of type T. Inherits from and provides strongly-typed access to the when the operation times out.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.PollingResult
files.Summary: Represents the result of a polling operation. Inherits from and provides strongly-typed access to the when the operation times out.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.Fault<TMessage>
files.Summary: Represents a fault envelope containing the original message and failure details.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IMessageContext

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IRequestConsumer<TRequest, TResponse>

files.Summary: Marker interface for request/reply consumers.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.RoutingKeyAttribute

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.IRequester

files.Summary: Provides extension methods for registering messaging services.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.IMessageConfigurationProvider
files.Summary: Provides access to message configuration and a few transport-friendly helpers. Implementations live in the messaging assembly and may call internal APIs.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.MessagingExchangeType

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.MessagingOptions

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.DeadLetterDefinition
files.Summary: Describes the dead letter queue and exchange configuration.

files.Summary: Fluent builder for constructing a .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.RetryPolicyDefinition

files.Summary: Marker interface for a request that produces a .

files.Summary: Cosmos outbox strategy - uses a simple relational query as a fallback. Consumers targeting Cosmos should implement an SDK-backed strategy for best performance.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cosmos.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessageEntityConfiguration
files.Summary: Cosmos-specific OutboxMessage mapping; provider-agnostic fallback mapping. Consumers may override in their DbContext.

files.Summary: Abstract base that implements and for outbox integration.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Data.DbContextExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for to support domain event dispatching on save.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Data.DbContextTransactionWrapper
files.Summary: Wraps an EF Core as an .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.DatabaseInfrastructureConfigurator<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Fluent configurator for database infrastructure including outbox processing. The DbContext itself is registered by provider-specific extensions (e.g. UseNpgsql) via the hook, not by this class.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for registering infrastructure-layer services.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.IDatabaseInfrastructureConfigurator<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Defines methods for configuring database infrastructure options for Entity Framework Core DbContext instances.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.MySql.DependencyInjectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extensions to configure provider-specific behavior for database infrastructure when using MySQL.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.MySql.OutboxProcessing.MySqlOutboxStrategy
files.Summary: MySQL-optimized outbox strategy that uses SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED to fetch messages concurrently.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.MySql.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessageEntityConfiguration
files.Summary: MySQL-specific OutboxMessage mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Npgsql.DependencyInjectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extensions to configure provider-specific behavior for database infrastructure when using PostgreSQL.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Npgsql.OutboxProcessing.NpgsqlOutboxStrategy
files.Summary: PostgreSQL-optimized outbox strategy that uses SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED to fetch messages concurrently.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Npgsql.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessageEntityConfiguration
files.Summary: PostgreSQL-specific OutboxMessage mapping. Stores Content as jsonb and adds helpful indexes.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.BaseOutboxStrategy
files.Summary: Provides a base implementation for outbox processing strategies, defining common operations for transactional message handling in an outbox pattern.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.DomainEventsToOutboxMessageSaveChangesInterceptor
files.Summary: EF Core save-changes interceptor that captures domain events from tracked aggregate roots and persists them as entries before the main save completes.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.IOutboxStrategy
files.Summary: Abstraction for provider-specific outbox lock acquisition, message fetching, updating, and transactional boundary.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.ISaveOutboxMessages
files.Summary: Exposes the entity set for persistence contexts that support outbox integration.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessage
files.Summary: Represents a serialized domain event stored for reliable outbox-based delivery.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessageData
files.Summary: Contains the data of an outbox message fetched for delivery.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessageEntityConfiguration
files.Summary: Provider-agnostic base configuration for . Provider packages should supply their own with optimized indexes, column types, and filters (e.g., jsonb + filtered index for Postgres).

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.OutboxMessageFailure
files.Summary: Contains failure details for an outbox message that could not be published.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.OutboxProcessingOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the outbox background processing service.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.OutboxProcessing.Telemetry
files.Summary: Static class for holding the Telemetry ActivitySource used for all outbox processing operations, enabling consistent correlation of telemetry across the capture, processing, and publishing stages.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Relational.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for applying pending Entity Framework Core migrations to a specified DbContext using dependency injection.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Relational.OutboxProcessing.RelationalOutboxStrategy
files.Summary: Base outbox strategy for relational database providers. Uses EF Core relational APIs () for batch updates. Provider-specific strategies (e.g., Npgsql, SqlServer) should inherit from this class and override to add row-level locking.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Repository.GenericRepository<TDbContext, TEntity, TId>
files.Summary: Base repository providing common data access operations for aggregate roots.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Primitives.AggregateRoot<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for aggregate roots that track and raise domain events.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Primitives.Entity<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for domain entities identified by a strongly-typed identifier.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Primitives.IAggregateRoot
files.Summary: Defines the contract for an aggregate root that tracks domain events.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseIntegrationTestCase<TFactory, TEntryPoint>
files.Summary: Base class for integration tests that use a with container-based infrastructure.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseUnitTestCase<TTarget>
files.Summary: Base class for unit tests that automatically creates and exposes a lazily-initialized target instance of TTarget.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseUnitTestCase
files.Summary: Base class for unit tests providing auto-mocking, lifecycle hooks, and a shared cancellation token.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseWebApplicationFactory<TEntryPoint>
files.Summary: Abstract that manages a set of test containers, injects their connection strings into the test host, and ensures EF Core migrations are applied during host startup.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.ContainerWrapper
files.Summary: Wraps a Testcontainers as a disposable .

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.DatabaseContainer<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Wraps a database container and tracks migration state for a specific type.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.DatabaseContainerWithRespawner<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Extends with Respawn-based database reset support.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.IContainerPool
files.Summary: Manages a pool of reusable test containers.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.IContainerWithConnectionStringPool<TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Strongly-typed variant of for a specific container type.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.IContainerWithConnectionStringPool
files.Summary: Extends with connection string support for containers that expose network endpoints.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.ICustomContainer
files.Summary: Wraps a Testcontainers container instance for test infrastructure use.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.ICustomDatabaseContainer
files.Summary: Extends with database-specific migration tracking.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.ICustomDatabaseContainerWithRespawner
files.Summary: Extends with Respawn-based database reset support.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.IDatabaseContainerPool<TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Strongly-typed variant of for a specific container type.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Containers.IDatabaseContainerPool
files.Summary: Extends with EF Core migration support for database containers.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestContainer
files.Summary: Represents a test container that can be started and stopped as part of the test lifecycle.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestContainerWithConnectionString
files.Summary: Extends with a connection string for use in integration tests.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestDatabaseContainer
files.Summary: Extends with database migration capabilities. Data is reset between tests through (Respawn).

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.TestContainerFixture<TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Base fixture that wraps a Testcontainers container as an for use in .

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.TestContainerFixtureWithConnectionString<TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Fixture that wraps a Testcontainers container and exposes a connection string for integration test configuration.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.TestDatabaseContainerFixture<TDbContext, TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Fixture that wraps a database container, applies EF Core migrations, and supports Respawn-based data resets between tests.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.CapturedHttpRequest
files.Summary: A snapshot of a request received by an , captured for assertions.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.HttpMock
files.Summary: Default in-process implementation. Holds the configured response rules and captured requests as durable state, and hands out lightweight instances (which the HTTP client factory owns and may dispose) that delegate back to this shared state.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.IHttpMock
files.Summary: An in-process fake for an outbound dependency. Configure stubbed responses per test and inspect the requests the system under test sent. Register one per typed client via AddHttpMock<TClient, TImplementation>() on the factory and retrieve it with HttpMock<TClient>().

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.IHttpMockResponseBuilder
files.Summary: Configures the response a matched request should receive. Returned by the On methods on . Header methods apply to the response defined by the preceding RespondWith call and can be chained.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.IResettableResource
files.Summary: A test resource whose state can be reset to a clean baseline between tests — for example a database reset via Respawn, or an HTTP mock whose configured responses and captured requests are cleared.
